title: Short id in issue create json
description:
Include the short id in the machine-readable create output.

## Success Criteria

- [hard] REQ-14: the issue create --json payload contains short_id alongside id.

## Notes

Create serializes the full `Issue` (main.rs:1001) where `short_id` is an unserialized method (types.rs:442); follow the existing custom-serialize pattern that listing/show use to inject `short_id` (types.rs:544).
